occurrence_sentence: " Single Quantum Eos system has allowed our research group to explore unchartered territories in the field of quantum information science. Its state-of-the-art timing resolution enabled the realization and characterization of a new and important class of quantum coherence phenomena. Additionally, the significant detection efficiencies have greatly reduced the time needed to acquire meaningful data, mitigating some of the burden associated with conducting sensitive measurements. " Dr. Steven Rogers / Prof. Qiang Lin, University of Rochester
